title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Bangalore

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Bangalore
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Bangalore. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!
